'''Zonama Sekot Shipbuilders''' was the manufacturer of the [[Kybo]], [[Grappler (starfighter)|Grappler]], [[Sekotan Skiff]], and the ''[[Jabitha]]''. It was established by [[Leor Hal]]. Their starships were known for having a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] rating of 0.4.

{{Company-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
